headlines.title: Shell Moves to Exit French Fuel Retail Market in Strategic Pivot
headlines.summary: Shell plans to sell its network of about 60 service stations in France in a deal that could be finalized early next year, French daily Les Echos reported on Tuesday, quoting a communication the UK-based supermajor has shared with the affected employees, suppliers, and concessiona

headlines.title: China’s LNG Imports Rebound From Eight-Year Low
headlines.summary: China’s imports of liquefied natural gas are on the mend, with the 30-day moving average rising to the highest level since late February, Bloomberg reported today, citing shipping data. The number is below the five-year average, the publication noted, but higher than it was in Ap

headlines.title: Oil Prices Rise as U.S.-Iran Peace Hopes Fade
headlines.summary: Crude oil prices ticked higher today as hopes for a peace deal between the United States and Iran faded further, after President Trump called Iran’s response to a U.S. peace deal proposal “garbage”. Iran’s response included a list of demands that the U.S. side has previously foun

headlines.title: After Squandering $25B In Refinery Overhauls, Nigeria Turns To Chinese Firms
headlines.summary: After a series of failed and costly attempts to revamp its aging refineries, Nigeria’s national oil company, the Nigerian National Petroleum Company Limited (NNPC), has signed a new agreement with Chinese firms to revive its moribund facilities. headlines.title: Aramco Sees Slow Oil Market Recovery after Shock Supply Loss
headlines.summary: The oil market will take months to normalize even if flows through the Strait of Hormuz resumed today, as 1 billion barrels of oil have been wiped off the supply balance over the past two and a half months. That’s the verdict on the global oil markets of Amin Nasser, chief execut

headlines.title: IEA: Portugal Energy Poverty Above EU Average, Despite Renewable Boom
headlines.summary: Portugal just got a thorough energy policy review from the IEA, and the short version is this: the power sector has done its job. Everything else needs to get moving. The Portugal 2026 Energy Policy Review, released in Lisbon this week, covers the full picture, electricity, gas,

headlines.title: Reuters Survey Shows OPEC Oil Output At 26-Year Low Amid Iran War
headlines.summary: OPEC oil output has declined to its lowest level since 2000, with production falling by 830,000 barrels per day (bpd) to an average of 20.04 million bpd in April, according to a Reuters survey published Monday. Kuwait recorded the largest production drop, with reports indicating

headlines.title: India Rejects Russian LNG Under Sanctions
headlines.summary: India has officially declined Russia's offer to sell liquefied natural gas (LNG) from projects currently under U.S. sanctions, following April reports of an LPG-laden tanker en route to western India, according to Indian media reports on Monday. Last month, Reuters reported that
